# Brainstorm Summary

## Date
2024-01-15

## Participants
- User
- Coach GPT

## User's Problem Statement
Build a simple todo app with React

## Key Requirements
1. Add todo items
2. Mark items as complete
3. Delete items
4. Local storage persistence

## Constraints
- Use React 18
- No external state management
- Keep it simple

## Agreed Architecture
Single page React app with local state

## Next Steps
- [ ] Freeze handoff package
- [ ] Start delegate mode
